ranked.thesis: Hand-curated scene-level film-semiotics dataset (253 films, ~329 symbolic categories, tiered scenes, object co-occurrence density) plus ~350K chars of citation-backed essays, wrapped in a deployable Astro/Cloudflare editorial+submission engine for the @AmpLabMedia channel. Reusable estate asset: a queryable object→scene→symbol knowledge graph and a clonable YAML-content-DB site template.
ranked.first_task: Expose the 253-film object-semiotics database (src/data/films.yaml via src/lib/films.ts) as a stable, documented public JSON endpoint (/films.json) with a published schema.
